unit.scope: Client vitest 1345/1345 (123 files). New DocumentMarkdown.test.tsx (12): frontmatterToCodeFence happy/CRLF/no-fm/unterminated/thematic-break-guard, findAnchorTarget dual-resolve, AC4 comment-hidden, AC6 frontmatter-block, AC7 inline-anchor (clobber-prefixed id), AC8 unprefixed heading slug, sanitizer strips <script>/on*, AC8 nav preventDefault. doc-sync gains DocumentMarkdown + PreviewPage tokens. Server unchanged (client-only iterate).

e2e.scope: Playwright (2 specs, 127.0.0.1-pinned worktree stack). (1) smartviewer-document-render.spec.ts via /preview route-mocks the file API and asserts in real Chromium: comment hidden, frontmatter as a <pre> block, h1 renders, inline <a id> present (clobber-prefixed), clicking an internal #-link scrolls the pane (scrollTop increases) without hash-navigating, pop-out button visible. (2) smartviewer-crossfile-nav.spec.ts runs with the REAL USERPROFILE (no mock): discovers the registered shipwright-webui project, opens the REAL .shipwright/compliance/traceability-matrix.md, clicks the real [FR-01.01](../../.shipwright/planning/01-adopted/spec.md#fr-0101) cross-file link, and asserts the pane navigated in-place to spec.md — closing the gap the synthetic same-document fixture had missed.

design_fidelity.scope: Document rendering + in-pane scroll behaviour asserted via computed DOM/scroll state in real Chromium (E2E) plus unit-level rendering assertions.

smoke.scope: Client-only iterate (markdown renderer + a client route). No server / API change. Stack booted only to drive the F0.5 E2E.

surface_verification.justification: UI render + new /preview route; surface=web (mandatory at medium) drove the real document rendering + in-pane anchor scroll against a live stack. Evidence: .shipwright/runs/iterate-2026-05-30-smartviewer-render-ux/surface_verification.json.

degraded.detail: touches_build (client/package.json gains rehype-raw/rehype-sanitize/rehype-slug). Lighthouse + bundle gate were not run in the iterate context (no dev_url / build-artifact wiring; /shipwright-test Step 3.8 skip-rules apply). The three packages are small unified plugins; bundle impact is minor and code-split is unaffected (file preview is already a non-critical pane).
